overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character running through a thick fog that gradually clears from night to morning. The character traverses a suburban environment from a roadside with construction barriers, through a grassy park area, and arrives at a motel complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy suburban road with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the foggy road, holding a weapon in right hand

entered.detail: red and white striped metal barriers blocking part of the road
tall street lamp illuminating the foggy area with artificial light
asphalt road surface with visible lane markings
large metal framework of a roller coaster visible through the fog
sparse trees lining the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a foggy suburban road at night, passing red and white construction barriers on the right. Street lamps provide artificial lighting, and a large roller coaster structure looms in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy park area adjacent to water

events.description: character moves from paved road onto grassy terrain near water
dawn breaks, ambient light increases significantly as fog begins to lift

agents.ego_description: running through grassy park area, moving away from the road toward trees

entered.detail: grassy ground with patches of dirt and leaves
calm body of water reflecting the dim light
faint lights from buildings visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the road to a grassy park area beside a body of water, running through scattered trees as dawn breaks and visibility improves. The roller coaster structure remains visible in the distance to the right.

events.description: character returns to paved surface, moving from grass to cracked sidewalk
a car drives past on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk parallel to the road, approaching a motel area

notable_agents.action: car driving along the road in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: weathered concrete sidewalk with visible cracks and patches
wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires
overhead electrical wires stretching across the scene
tall vertical sign with MOTEL lettering becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The character moves back onto a cracked concrete sidewalk alongside a road, passing utility poles and power lines as the foggy morning light reveals a distant motel sign. A car drives past on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: motel parking lot and entrance area

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching the motel entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the motel building, moving toward the entrance area

entered.detail: two-story red brick building with multiple windows and exterior corridors
vintage station wagon parked near the motel entrance
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the motel

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a roadside motel, passing a large vertical MOTEL sign and approaching the two-story brick building. A vintage station wagon is parked near the entrance as the character moves into the motel parking area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy suburban night that gradually transitions into the clear light of dawn. It begins with a character running along a dark road, passing red and white construction barriers under the artificial glow of street lamps while a massive roller coaster looms in the distant fog. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the pavement to a grassy park area beside a body of water. The lighting then transforms from deep night to the pale hues of daybreak, improving visibility as the camera glides through scattered trees. The movement concludes with the roller coaster remaining a distant landmark to the right as the environment opens up into the morning light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate roadside through a thick morning haze that gradually clears to reveal a roadside motel. It begins with the character stepping onto a cracked concrete sidewalk, passing utility poles and power lines as a car drives past on the left. As the camera advances, the foggy light begins to lift, bringing a distant motel sign into clearer view. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the property, passing beneath a large vertical MOTEL sign and approaching a two-story brick building. Finally, the camera glides into the parking area, passing a vintage station wagon parked near the entrance.
